eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Kendall, TX; at 8:39 AM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 9:09 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Emergency crews are working rising water across the city and various locations of the county seek higher ground and stay off the roads if possible B Constantine Kendall OEM Shelter in place
